channel.title: I2p on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in I2p on Pi Stack

item.title: i2pd vs I2P: Best Self-Hosted Anonymous Network Routers (2026)
item.description: Anonymous networking has become increasingly important as surveillance, censorship, and data collection expand across the internet. While tools like Tor are well-known, the Invisible Internet Project (I2P) offers a fundamentally different approach to anonymous communication that is optimized for hidden services rather than accessing the public web.
